text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The day of Narita Taishin's debut is<n>here at last!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She seems rather restless while she<n>waits for the
race to begin...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But I'm able to ease her nerves with<n>some
passionate words of<n>encouragement.
